title: Kickoff brief — visualize 5 different options for adding a search feature
prompt: Your brainstorm: “visualize 5 different options for adding a search feature”. The demo engine cannot generate options from a prompt — but this brief CAN steer the real generator. Select the directions that fit, set the dials, elaborate, and send: everything is captured to this thread for Claude to pick up.

options.label: Literal take
options.description: draw exactly what the prompt says
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 150" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="4" y="4" width="192" height="142" rx="10"/><text x="14" y="24" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#a855f7" stroke="none">LITERAL</text><circle cx="178" cy="20" r="8"/><circle cx="178" cy="20" r="3" fill="#a855f7" stroke="none"/><text x="14" y="52" font-size="9" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"><tspan x="14" dy="0">visualize 5 different options for</tspan><tspan x="14" dy="13">adding a search feature</tspan></text><text x="14" y="132" font-size="8" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.6" stroke="none">draw exactly what the prompt says</text></svg>

options.label: Abstract take
options.description: capture the feeling, drop the objects
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 150" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="4" y="4" width="192" height="142" rx="10"/><text x="14" y="24" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#a855f7" stroke="none">ABSTRACT</text><path d="M166 14c8-6 18 2 12 9s-18 2-12-9Z" stroke="#a855f7"/><text x="14" y="52" font-size="9" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"><tspan x="14" dy="0">visualize 5 different options for</tspan><tspan x="14" dy="13">adding a search feature</tspan></text><text x="14" y="132" font-size="8" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.6" stroke="none">capture the feeling, drop the objects</text></svg>

survey.elaborationPrompt: Elaborate — what direction should the next round take?
